headlines.description: Borussia Dortmund, under interim coach Mike Tullberg, squandered a two-goal advantage before drawing 2-2 at home to Werder Bremen on Saturday
headlines.shortLinkText: BVB surrender 2-goal lead in Tullberg's first game

video.headline: Leonardo Bittencourt scores stunner to bring Bremen back into the game

tracking.trackingName: SOC_One-Play (Leonardo Bittencourt finds the back of the net for Werder Bremen) 2025/01/25 ESHEET

headlines.description: Bundesliga leaders Bayern Munich secured a nervous 2-1 victory at Freiburg on Saturday thanks to goals from Harry Kane and Kim Min-Jae.
headlines.shortLinkText: Kane on target as Bayern overcome Freiburg

video.headline: Harry Kane drills Bayern in front

tracking.trackingName: SOC_One-Play (Harry Kane drills Bayern in front) 2025/01/25 ESHEET
